recommendations.title: Saturday Night and Sunday Morning
recommendations.overview: A 22-year-old factory worker lets loose on the weekends: drinking, brawling, and dating two women, one of whom is older and married.

recommendations.title: Altar
recommendations.overview: A young family find themselves in serious danger when they move to an isolated haunted house in the Yorkshire Moors.

recommendations.title: Days of Heaven
recommendations.overview: In 1916, a Chicago steel worker accidentally kills his supervisor and flees to the Texas panhandle with his girlfriend and little sister to work harvesting wheat in the fields of a stoic farmer.

recommendations.title: Sauvage
recommendations.overview: Léo, a 22-year-old homeless sex worker searches for genuine love on the streets of Strasbourg.

recommendations.title: Good Luck to You, Leo Grande
recommendations.overview: Nancy Stokes, a retired schoolteacher, is pretty sure she has never had good sex. Now that her husband has died, she is determined to take a tour of sexual vistas that until now she has only imagined. She even has a plan; it involves an anonymous hot

recommendations.title: The Railway Children Return
recommendations.overview: Follow a group of children who are evacuated to a Yorkshire village during the Second World War, where they encounter a young soldier who, like them, is far away from home.

recommendations.title: Anora
recommendations.overview: A young sex worker from Brooklyn gets her chance at a Cinderella story when she meets and impulsively marries the son of an oligarch. Once the news reaches Russia, her fairytale is threatened as his parents set out to get the marriage annulled.

recommendations.title: 7th Heaven
recommendations.overview: In 1910s Paris, a sewer worker disillusioned with Christianity feels his prayers have been answered when he chances upon a street waif and they fall in love.

recommendations.title: Palo Alto
recommendations.overview: A lack of parental guidance encourages teens in an affluent California town to rebel with substance abuse and casual sex.

recommendations.title: Sunrise: A Song of Two Humans
recommendations.overview: A married farmer falls under the spell of a slatternly woman from the city, who tries to convince him to drown his wife.
